name: Cleridae
diagnosis: Cleridae are a family of beetles of the superfamily Cleroidea. They are commonly known as checkered beetles. The family Cleridae has a worldwide distribution, and a variety of habitats and feeding preferences.

genus_notes.enoclerus: Enoclerus is a genus of beetles in the subfamily Clerinae.
genus_notes.placopterus: Placopterus is a genus of checkered beetles in the family Cleridae.
genus_notes.priocera: Priocera is a genus of beetles in the subfamily Clerinae.
genus_notes.cymatodera: Cymatodera is a genus of checkered beetles in the family Cleridae.
genus_notes.chariessa: Chariessa is a genus of checkered beetles in the family Cleridae.
genus_notes.necrobia: Necrobia is a genus of beetles belonging to the family Cleridae.
genus_notes.neorthopleura: Neorthopleura is a genus of checkered beetles in the family Cleridae.
genus_notes.madoniella: Madoniella is a genus of checkered beetles in the family Cleridae.
genus_notes.trichodes: Trichodes is a genus of checkered beetles belonging to the family Cleridae, subfamily Clerinae.
genus_notes.cregya: Cregya is a genus of checkered beetles in the family Cleridae.
